collider_bias.explanation: Conditioning on V2 does not introduce collider bias for the X -> Y effect.

ett.raw_estimand: ((Sum[AUX1_X, V1, V2](P(AUX1_X) * P(V1) * P[AUX1_X,V1](V2) * P[V1](X) * P[V2,X](Y)) / Sum[AUX1_X, V1, V2, Y](Sum[AUX1_X, V1, V2](P(AUX1_X) * P(V1) * P[AUX1_X,V1](V2) * P[V1](X) * P[V2,X](Y)))))
ett.observational_estimand: ((Sum[AUX1_X, V1, V2](P(AUX1_X) * P(V1) * P(V2 | AUX1_X, V1) * P(X | V1) * P(Y | AUX1_X, V1, V2, X)) / Sum[AUX1_X, V1, V2, Y](Sum[AUX1_X, V1, V2](P(AUX1_X) * P(V1) * P(V2 | AUX1_X, V1) * P(X | V1) * P(Y | AUX1_X, V1, V2, X)))))
